brand_identity.name: Redacted
brand_identity.tagline: Declassify the Truth. Viralize the Secrets.
brand_identity.metaphor: A high-tech underground bunker terminal processing sensitive government leaks.
brand_identity.visual_style: Digital Brutalism meets Spy Thriller. Think 'Control' (the game) mixed with 'The Matrix' and a messy government archive.

secondary_font.name: JetBrains Mono
secondary_font.usage: Body text, Data displays, Input fields, Code blocks

rules.body: Monospace, generous line-height, slightly smaller size (text-sm) for that 'technical data' feel.
rules.labels: Uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-widest), tiny text (text-xs), opacity-70.

usage.primary_action: bg-[#f4f4f5] text-[#09090b] hover:bg-[#22c55e] hover:text-black transition-colors duration-200
usage.destructive_action: bg-transparent border border-[#ef4444] text-[#ef4444] hover:bg-[#ef4444] hover:text-white

colors.gradients: No gradients. Use solid blocks of color or noise textures.

textures.noise_overlay: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] z-50 bg-[url('https://images.pexels.com/photos/5052331/pexels-photo-5052331.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940')] bg-repeat mix-blend-overlay

effects.redacted: bg-current text-transparent select-none animate-pulse cursor-help hover:bg-transparent hover:text-current transition-all duration-300
effects.glitch: See generic CSS for glitch keyframes
effects.terminal_cursor: inline-block w-2 h-5 bg-[#22c55e] animate-pulse ml-1 align-middle

buttons.style: rounded-none border-2 border-transparent uppercase font-bold tracking-wider px-6 py-3

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-b-2 border-[#3f3f46] focus:border-[#22c55e] rounded-none px-4 py-3 font-mono text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 outline-none transition-colors

cards.style: bg-[#18181b] border border-[#3f3f46] p-6 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden group
cards.decoration: Add a small 'corner cut' using clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% calc(100% - 12px), calc(100% - 12px) 100%, 0 100%)

layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-8, p-12) to create a 'lab' feel. Use gaps of gap-8.
layout.grid: Use CSS Grid (grid-cols-12). Alignments should be strict.

types.decode: Text characters cycling randomly before settling on the final letter.
types.scan: A horizontal line moving down the container (scanning effect).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text is at least Zinc-400 on Zinc-950.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glitch effects and text decoding if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

image_urls.placeholder_logo: Use a simple SVG shape (triangle/square) or text logo.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Oswald and JetBrains Mono to index.html immediately.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (zinc-950 based).
3. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a 'Shell' component that wraps the app with the noise texture overlay.

5. PREVIEW CARDS: For the social media posts, do NOT use the brutalist style. They must look like ACTUAL screenshots of FB/IG/X posts to show the user what they will get. Wrap these preview cards in a brutalist container.
6. FILE UPLOAD: Make the dropzone look like a scanning bed (grid background, moving scan line).
7. RESULTS PAGE: Use a Bento grid to show the 3 generated posts side-by-side (or stacked on mobile).
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Hovering over 'Redacted' text should reveal it. Buttons should have a mechanical click feel (scale down slightly).
9. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' with a custom black/green theme.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
